mapper.sql: alevel_asset_id, owner_type, owner_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, file_hash, mime_type, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_asset WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_asset_id ASC
